en.text: from a compound of G0001 (as a negative particle) and a presumed σελγής (of uncertain derivation, but apparently meaning continent); licentiousness (sometimes including other vices)

senses.gloss_en: from a compound of G0001 (as a negative particle) and a presumed σελγής (of uncertain derivation, but apparently meaning continent); licentiousness (sometimes including other vices)
